sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104988" key="tri/klwstos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρί-κλωστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n104988.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">thricespun, three-twisted,</tr_> of a line, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.109</biblScope> </bibl> (Antip.).</sense> </entryFree>
